subcodes.first_line: O Most Exalted Pen! Make mention of the Pasha, whom this servant in attendance hath remembered, for verily Thou art the Compassionate, the One Who remembereth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا قلم الاعلی ان اذکر الپاشا الذی ذکره العبد الحاضر انک انت الذاکر المشفق
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
